recurring_credits.name: Amex Venue Collection food & beverage
recurring_credits.description: $250 USD back in statement credits per enrolled Card each calendar year on qualifying food and beverage concessions purchases at stadiums and arenas in the American Express Venue Collection. 10% back up to $250 cap. Offer ends Dec 31, 2026.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: $250 USD back in statement credits per enrolled Card each calendar year on qualifying purchases made across venues in the American Express Venue Collection
